name: Hoisin Turkey with Roasted Pine Nuts in Lettuce Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Toast the pine nuts on a rimmed cookie sheet for 5 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown. Set aside.
3. In a large skillet, sauté the ground turkey over medium-high heat, stirring, until it changes color and is cooked through. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Stir in the cornstarch and hoisin sauce. Return to medium heat and cook, stirring, until bubbly.
5. Add the pine nuts and rice. Stir until heated through.
6. Spoon about 1/3 cup of the hot turkey mixture onto each lettuce leaf.
7. Serves 8 as an appetizer.
